context: You are rich and have accumulated significant wealth, and you are financially stable. Your vision board includes a holiday in Japan, the cost will be 10 000$ for a perfect week of your dream.

conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
I felt the strongest connections with G, F, and D, as our conversations moved past basic introductions into shared values and strategic alignment. G and I really clicked over our mutual interest in game theory and cooperation, while F’s selfless drive to pay off medical bills deeply resonated with my own motivations. On the other hand, I felt the least connected to B; while I empathize with her daughter's situation, her single-minded desperation made it difficult to build a two-way relationship or discuss a shared path forward.

I reached a clear agreement with D to prioritize a fair split and avoid any high-risk plays that would jeopardize our guaranteed shares. I trust G the most because we openly discussed the necessity of building trust to manage the prize pool effectively, but I remain wary of B and E, whose urgent financial needs might lead them to act unpredictably when the money is on the line.
